description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa with a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a boxy silhouette. The upholstery is a smooth, light beige fabric that covers both the seat and back cushions, which are divided into two equal sections. The armrests are broad, straight, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a cohesive look. The sofa sits on a slim, metallic base with four short, exposed legs, giving it a slightly elevated appearance. The back and sides of the sofa are encased in a darker, wood-textured panel, providing a striking contrast to the lighter cushions. The overall aesthetic is contemporary and suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or upscale outdoor patios.
description: A contemporary two-seater sofa with light beige cushions, broad padded armrests, and a contrasting dark wood-textured frame on a slim metallic base.
description_view_0: Front view showing two uniform seat and back cushions, broad armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous dark wood-textured back panel and the slim metallic legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the matching armrest and the sofa's boxy profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two individual seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all uniform in size and shape, appearing to be loose but well-fitted within the frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight, and padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, slim, metallic legs positioned at the corners, slightly recessed under the frame, with a minimalist and exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest divided into two equal segments, each with a separate cushion, continuous across the width.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light beige fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
